speaker: speaker1
text: Hey Jimmy . Let's go workout later today .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure . What time do you want to go ?

speaker: speaker2
text: That sounds good . Today we work on Legs and forearm .

speaker: speaker1
text: Hey . I just played basketball earlier , so my legs are a little sore . Let's work out on arms and stomach today .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm on a weekly schedule . You're messing everything up .

speaker: speaker1
text: C'mon . We're only switching two days . You can do legs on Friday .

speaker: speaker2
text: Aright . I'll meet you at the gym at 3:30 then .
